title: shorea selanica
intro: Shorea selanica, also known as Selan Tree, is a species of tree in the family Dipterocarpaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Shorea selanica include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to lower cholesterol levels and improve cardiovascular health. Shorea selanica can be prepared as herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically made by drying the leaves, bark, or roots of the tree.
